claim_boundaries: comparator claims require implemented and registered evidence
current_claim: Registered topological summaries distinguish deliberately structured weak-control generated byte streams from the deterministic baseline under the configured internal workflow. Other tested generated-stream conditions do not show comparable broad top-ranked separation under the current internal summaries.
